series_metadata.series_description: All records supporting how grantees utilized grant funds on allowable grant expenditures during the federal and state grant period of availability. Any unused funds are reported on the FER and, if permitted, moved forward for use in the next fiscal year.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain six (6) years after grant activity, then dispose/delete ; Electronic: Retain six (6) years after grant activity, then dispose/delete, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
